case_title: RADA, EDELBERTO N VS MATELA, KENNETH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,850.00 FILED BY RADA, EDELBERTO N AS TO DEFENDANT MATELA, KENNETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MATELA, KENNETH

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RADA, EDELBERTO N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATELA, KENNETH $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,820.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MATELA, KENNETH
